allow:
Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Convert document storage from markdown to JSON format

- Update backend to use JSON file format instead of markdown
- Change import from document_to_markdown/markdown_to_document to document_to_json/json_to_document
- Update file extension from .md to .json in paths and glob patterns
- Remove old markdown document files
- Add example JSON document format
- Update frontend hooks and markdown utilities to work with new format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
